title: Tick Control in Bethpage, NY
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Bethpage, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Prices from $125-$325. Free estimates available!
intro: Bethpage residents know that ticks are a serious concern in Long Island's suburban landscape, especially with the prevalence of Lyme disease in our area. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services to protect your family, pets, and outdoor spaces from these dangerous parasites. Our tick treatment programs are designed specifically for Bethpage's residential properties, parks, and wooded areas.
whyUs: We combine local expertise with proven tick elimination methods tailored to Long Island's unique environment. Our licensed technicians understand Bethpage's tick activity patterns and use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for your family and pets while effectively reducing tick populations on your property.
localContext: From homes near Bethpage State Park to residential neighborhoods around the historic Grumman Memorial Park, tick exposure is a year-round concern for Bethpage families. The abundance of wooded areas, community parks, and family-friendly outdoor spaces makes professional tick control essential for maintaining safe yards and recreational areas throughout our community.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Bethpage, NY?
faqs.answer: While ticks are most active from April through October in Bethpage, deer ticks can be active whenever temperatures rise above freezing. We recommend year-round vigilance and seasonal treatments beginning in early spring for optimal protection against Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Bethpage range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size, the severity of the tick problem, and the treatment plan selected. We offer single treatments as well as seasonal programs with multiple applications for comprehensive protection throughout the year.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and allowing the treatment to dry completely (typically 2-4 hours) before resuming normal outdoor activities in treated areas.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after tick treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in tick activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. For maximum effectiveness, we recommend combining our professional treatments with yard maintenance practices like keeping grass short, clearing leaf litter, and creating wood chip barriers between lawns and wooded areas around your Bethpage property.
